shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '600,675p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; sed -n '1080,1135p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; sed -n '1,70p' src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/constants.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/get.ts; sed -n '1,140p' src/utils/set.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/unset.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/isObject.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1035,1145p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; sed -n '3750,3840p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; sed -n '1,80p' src/types/errors.ts; rg -n \"export type FieldErrors|FieldError\" src/types/errors.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '330,410p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '1125,1185p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; git log -8 --oneline -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '680,735p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; rg -n \"describe\\('validation|describe\\('with resolver|it\\('should update error\" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | head -30"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | sed -n '815,840p'; git diff -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx"
